curation_notes: Patch commit 214a71e3 fixes nil pointer dereference bugs across 3 NGAP handover handler files by adding nil checks before accessing AmfUe(), Radio, and TargetUe fields. Locations derived from the patch diff. Two sibling files (handle_handover_notify.go and handle_handover_required.go) contain the same unguarded nil dereference pattern on AmfUe() and Radio fields and were added as additional locations. Pre-assigned class null-deref confirmed: CWE-476 maps directly and the patch clearly adds nil pointer guards.
